ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Student ID of the candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Family name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., IELTS, TOEFL) */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score possible in the test */,
  "passing_score" REAL /* Passing score for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the section belongs to */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  "section_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the section in the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sections_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who took the test */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the score belongs to */,
  "score" REAL /* Actual score of the candidate in the section */,
  "scaled_score" REAL /* Scaled score of the candidate in the section */,
  "band_score" REAL /* Band score of the candidate in the section (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES test_sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the test center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the test center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the test center */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the test center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person at the test center */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person at the test center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test session */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test center where the session is scheduled */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test being administered */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the test session */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time of the test session */,
  "seats_available" INTEGER /* Number of seats available in the test session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES test_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_sessions" (
  "candidate_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate session */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session the candidate is registered for */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration for the test session */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the candidate in the test session (e.g., present, absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_sessions_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who made the payment */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test for which the report was generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of report generation */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report (e.g., PDF file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was updated */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was updated */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
